# Manage provider versions API reference

Use the provider version management API endpoints to list, add, and update tags for provider versions in your organization's registry.

## List all tags for a provider version

Use this endpoint to list all tags assigned to a provider version.

`GET /api/v2/registry-provider-versions/:provider_version_id/tag-bindings`

| Parameter | Description |
| :---- | :---- |
| `:provider_version_id` | The specific provider version ID whose tags you want to list. |

| Status | Response | Reason |
| :---- | :---- | :---- |
| [200][] | [JSON API document][] | The request was successful. |
| [401][] | [JSON API error object][] | User unauthorized. |
| [404][] | [JSON API error object][] | The provider version does not exist. |

### Sample request

```shell
curl \
  --request GET \
  --header "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" \
  https://app.terraform.io/api/v2/registry-provider-versions/provver-E94qRpUHFZezgEWC/tag-bindings
```

### Sample response

```json
{
  "data": [
    {
      "id": "tb-LDojeUQnBPGYbDdA",
      "type": "tag-bindings",
      "attributes": {
        "key": "environment",
        "value": "dev",
        "created-at": "2026-07-15T20:11:56.432Z"
      }
    },
    {
      "id": "tb-HPnKh5kf4TiGYMVr",
      "type": "tag-bindings",
      "attributes": {
        "key": "environment",
        "value": "testing",
        "created-at": "2026-07-15T20:11:56.437Z"
      }
    }
  ],
  "links": {
    "target": "/api/v2/organizations/hashicorp/registry-providers/private/hashicorp/test-provider/versions?version=5.14.0"
  }
}
```

## Add or update tags for a provider version

Send a `PATCH` request to the following endpoint to add or update tags for a provider version in your organization's registry.

To remove tags from a provider version, omit the tag keys and values from the request body when sending the `PATCH` request.

`PATCH /api/v2/organizations/:organization_name/registry-providers/:registry_name/:namespace/:provider_name/versions/:provider_version`

| Parameter | Description |
| :---- | :---- |
| `:organization_name` | The name of the organization the provider belongs to. |
| `:registry_name` | Either `public` or `private`.|
| `:namespace` | The namespace of the provider. |
| `:provider_name` | The name of the provider whose version you want to tag. |
| `:provider_version` | The provider version you want to add or update a tag for. |

| Status | Response | Reason |
| :---- | :---- | :---- |
| [200][] | [JSON API document][] | Successfully added or updated the tag binding. |
| [400][] | [JSON API error object][] | Request body cannot be parsed. |
| [401][] | [JSON API error object][] | User not authorized. |
| [404][] | [JSON API error object][] | The provider version does not exist. |
| [422][] | [JSON API error object] | HCP Terraform can't process the content because the tag key or value format is incorrect. |

### Request body

This PATCH endpoint requires a JSON object with the following properties as a request payload.

| Key path | Type | Default | Description |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| `data.type` | string |  | Must be `"registry-provider-versions"`. |
| `data.relationships.tag-bindings.data.attributes.key` | string |  | The tag key. |
| `data.relationships.tag-bindings.data.attributes.value` | string |  | The tag value. |

### Sample payload

```json
{
  "data": {
    "type": "registry-provider-versions",
    "relationships": {
      "organization": {
        "data": {
          "type": "organizations",
          "id": "hashicorp"
        }
      },
      "tag-bindings": {
        "data": [
          {
            "type": "tag-bindings",
            "attributes": {
              "key": "environment",
              "value": "dev"
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "tag-bindings",
            "attributes": {
              "key": "environment",
              "value": "testing"
            }
          }
        ]
      }
    }
  }
}
```

### Sample request

```shell
curl \
  --header "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" \
  --header "Content-Type: application/vnd.api+json" \
  --request PATCH \
  --data @payload.json \
  https://app.terraform.io/api/v2/organizations/hashicorp/registry-providers/private/hashicorp/test-provider/versions/0.0.4
```

### Sample response

```json
{
  "data": {
    "id": "provver-E94qRpUHFZezgEWC",
    "type": "registry-provider-versions",
    "attributes": {
      "version": "0.0.4",
      "created-at": "2026-02-24T02:45:50.571Z",
      "updated-at": "2026-02-24T02:45:50.571Z",
      "key-id": "34365D9472D7468F",
      "protocols": [
        "5.0"
      ],
      "permissions": {
        "can-delete": true,
        "can-upload-asset": true
      },
      "shasums-uploaded": false,
      "shasums-sig-uploaded": false
    },
    "relationships": {
      "registry-provider": {
        "data": {
          "id": "prov-kYepEWv1vNWdKAsM",
          "type": "registry-providers"
        }
      },
      "tag-bindings": {
        "links": {
          "related": "/api/v2/registry-provider-versions/provver-E94qRpUHFZezgEWC/tag-bindings"
        }
      },
      "registry-provider-platforms": {
        "data": [],
        "links": {
          "related": "/api/v2/organizations/hashicorp/registry-providers/private/hashicorp/test-provider/versions/5.14.0/platforms"
        }
      }
    },
    "links": {
      "shasums-upload": "https://archivist.terraform.io/v1/object/dmF1bHQ6djU6bjNHZW9jV3NhRUxjZGJma1",
      "shasums-sig-upload": "https://archivist.terraform.io/v1/object/dmF1bHQ6djU6WnBVNlJ3Y2RzcEgxUHB"
    }
  }
}
```
